message:
feat(telemetry): sound ring-buffer writes, real flush path, and shutdown

Completes the telemetry recorder implementation (closes bd-0fe8,
bd-6itz) with three coordinated changes:

1. disruptor.rs — Replaces raw-pointer get_mut(&mut self) with a
   sound interior-mutability API:
   - Buffer storage changed from Vec<FixedSizeEvent> to
     Vec<UnsafeCell<FixedSizeEvent>>
   - New write_event(&self, sequence, event) replaces unsafe get_mut
   - try_read now returns owned FixedSizeEvent (copy) instead of &ref
   - Explicit unsafe impl Sync with safety comment documenting the
     single-producer/committed-read invariant
   - New FixedSizeEvent::from_parts() builder for constructing events
   - New test: write_and_read_event_roundtrip verifying the full
     claim → write → commit → read cycle

2. recorder.rs — Implements real audit flushing and clean shutdown:
   - AuditRow struct for structured event accumulation
   - Background flusher reads committed events, converts to AuditRow,
     and writes Arrow RecordBatch via BatchedWriter
   - AtomicBool shutdown signal replaces fire-and-forget thread
   - Drop impl signals shutdown and joins the flusher thread
   - Stable EventType string/discriminant conversion via
     event_type_name() and event_type_discriminant()

3. shadow.rs — Adds event builder and type conversion helpers
   supporting the recorder's structured event pipeline

4. tests/recorder_nomock.rs — New no-mock integration test verifying
   real parquet persistence through the full record → flush → read
   cycle without any test doubles.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
